metadata.name: streak_vault
metadata.description: Streak Phase 3 - Yield Farming Vault & House Bot

accounts.name: winner_token_mint
docs: Mint of the winner token (yes or no) - must match event.winner_token_mint

instructions.name: close_empty_position
docs: Close UserPosition when principal=0 and pending_yield=0. Reclaims rent to user.
Call claim_yield first if you have pending yield.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Only bot_authority can call this instruction

errors.name: AdminOnly
errors.msg: Only admin can call this instruction

errors.name: InvalidBotPositionPda
errors.msg: Bot position account must be the PDA for this bot and event_nonce

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: YieldCreditTooSoon
errors.msg: credit_daily_yield can only be called once per UTC day

errors.name: WithdrawLocked
errors.msg: Withdraw not allowed before unlock timestamp

errors.name: EventNotFinished
errors.msg: Event must be finished before claiming rebate

errors.name: EventAlreadyFinished
errors.msg: Cannot purchase tokens after event is finished

errors.name: EventNotStarted
errors.msg: Event must be in Started state to create vault

errors.name: NotUserBot
errors.msg: Only user bots can claim rebate

errors.name: InvalidEventNonceLength
errors.msg: event_nonce must be 1-32 characters (UUID without dashes)

errors.name: InvalidTokenMint
errors.msg: Token mint must be event's yes_token_mint, no_token_mint, or usdc_mint

errors.name: InvalidWinnerToken
errors.msg: Winner token must be event's yes_token_mint or no_token_mint

errors.name: InvalidRedeemToken
errors.msg: Token being redeemed must match event winner

errors.name: PositionNotEmpty
errors.msg: Position must be empty (principal=0, pending_yield=0) to close; use claim_yield first if needed

types.name: BotPosition
docs: Bot position per event. PDA seeds: [SEED, bot_key.key(), event_nonce.as_bytes()]

types.name: GlobalVaultState
docs: Global Vault State - Master PDA holding all vault configuration and accounting

types.name: UserPosition
docs: User Position - Tracks individual user's deposit and yield
